backstory.original: Zorbu grew up in a small village on the slopes of the mountains south of Yartar. He lived a typical gnomish childhood: tinkering with mechanical toys, pulling pranks on unsuspecting neighbors, and exploring the woodlands covering the mountains in the company of a local dwarf ranger, Galor Rockshield. One night an army of Lolth's followers descended upon the village in force. Galor saved Zorbu's life, but many others were killed, including Zorbu's parents. From that day forth, Zorbu trained under Galor as a ranger, vowing to prevent another such tragedy from occurring. Cunning and imaginative, Zorbu makes use of his tinkering skills to wield an impossibly large crossbow called Thunderbolt.
backstory.display: 佐布在雅塔南部山坡上的一个小村庄里长大。他拥有典型的侏儒式童年：捣鼓机械玩具，对毫无戒心的邻居大搞恶作剧，并在当地矮人巡林客盖勒·岩盾的陪伴下，探索覆盖山区的林地。一天晚上，罗丝的追随者结成军队，大局侵袭村庄。盖勒救了佐布的命，但包括佐布父母在内的许多人都被杀了。从那天起，佐布在盖勒的手下接受巡林客训练，发誓要避免这样的惨剧再度发生。狡黠而富有想象力的佐布，利用他的巧匠技能制作了一把大得夸张的十字弩，名为“霹雳”

description.original: Zorbu fires a bolt from his massive crossbow at a random enemy, dealing damage to all.
description.display: 佐布用他的巨型弩弓向一名随机敌人发射弩箭，对所有敌人造成伤害。

description.original: Zorbu winds up a small mechanical squirrel and sends it skittering towards a random enemy.
description.display: 佐布为一只机械松鼠上好发条，然后让它跑向一名随机敌人。

longDescription.original: Zorbu winds up a small mechanical squirrel and sends it skittering towards a random enemy. When it reaches them, it detonates a hidden vial of Alchemist's fire inside, dealing damage to (and stunning) all nearby enemies.
longDescription.display: 佐布为一只机械松鼠上好发条，然后让它跑向一名随机敌人。松鼠靠近敌人后会引爆体内隐藏的一瓶炼金术士之火，对附近所有敌人造成伤害（并使他们眩晕）。

description.desc: Humanoids, beasts, undead, and aberrations are Zorbu's Favored Foes. He tracks the number of each type that he has killed and gains a $(amount)% damage bonus against that type for each kill, stacking additively. If an enemy has multiple types, they count for each type and the damage bonuses stack multiplicatively. These bonuses persist through resets.
类人生物、兽类、亡灵和异怪是佐布的偏好对手。他会记录自己击杀的每种类型敌人的数量，每次击杀会获得对该类型敌人的 $(amount)% 伤害加成，以加算方式堆叠。如果一名敌人拥有多种类型，则每种类型都会计数，伤害加成以乘算方式堆叠。此加成在重置后会保留。

tipText.original: Zorbu tracks the number of certain types of enemies that he kills and increases his own damage based on that.
tipText.display: 佐布会记录自己击杀的特定类型敌人的数量并据此提升自身伤害。

description.desc: Zorbu's damage is increased by an amount equal to $(amount)% of the sum of his base Know Your Enemy buffs.
佐布的伤害提高量相当于其基础“了解敌人”增益总量的 $(amount)%。
Increases the damage of champions adjacent to Zorbu with a DEX score of 15 or higher by $(amount)%.
与佐布相邻且敏捷大于等于 15 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Zorbu buffs Champions adjacent to him who have a Dexterity score of 15 or higher.
tipText.display: 佐布强化与自己相邻且敏捷大于等于 15 的勇士。

description.desc: Increases Hunter's Pack by the bonus provided by Focused Fury.
通过专注怒火提供的加成提高猎者兽群效果。

specializationDescription.original: Zorbu supports other hunters in the formation by increasing his Hunter's Pack bonus.
specializationDescription.display: 佐布通过提升自己猎者兽群的加成来支援阵型中的其他猎人。

description.desc: The Know Your Enemy counters additionally increment once for each Champion in the formation affected by Hunter's Pack each time a valid enemy is killed.
每当一名有效敌人被击杀时，阵型中每位受猎者兽群影响的勇士都会使了解敌人的计数增加一次。

specializationDescription.original: Zorbu recruits some friends to help him "more accurately" tally the number of foes he has slain.
specializationDescription.display: 佐布招募一些朋友来帮助他“更精确地”记录他击杀的敌人数量。

description.desc: Zorbu's damage is increased by the bonus provided by Hunter's Pack.
通过猎者兽群提供的加成提高佐布的伤害。

description.original: You don't need to be an elf to aim like one.
description.display: 你不需要成为一名精灵，也可以像精灵一样精准。

description.original: I've trained my whole life for this.
description.display: 我一辈子都在练习这个。

description.original: Nobody should suffer as I have.
description.display: 不该再有人像我这样经受痛苦。

description.original: Together we will cleanse the world of all evil!
description.display: 我们并肩协力，净化世间所有的邪恶！

description.original: A split party is known as a meal to monsters.
description.display: 分散的团队等同于怪物的大餐。

description.original: I can smell a Drow from a mile away.
description.display: 我能从一英里外闻到卓尔精灵的味道。

description.original: Our quarry awaits.
description.display: 我们的猎物在等待。

description.original: The tactics of the strange must be learned before engagement.
description.display: 交战之前必须了解陌生者的战术。

description.original: Not everything is learned in battle.
description.display: 战斗无法教会你一切。

description.original: Little goes unnoticed to my eyes.
description.display: 什么都逃不过我的眼睛。

description.original: You need at least two centuries of training to get on my level.
description.display: 你得再训练两百年才能达到我的水平。

description.original: A lone wolf is dangerous. A pack is lethal.
description.display: 独狼危险。狼群致命。

description.original: My trinkets don't just appear out of thin air, you know!
description.display: 我的饰品可不会凭空蹦出来，明白吗！

description.original: It's all about leverage!
description.display: 筹码最重要！

description.original: I vow to protect this world from those who would despoil it.
description.display: 我发誓守护这个世界，绝不让企图掠夺蹂躏它的人得逞。

description.original: A little tougher to reload than your average crossbow.
description.display: 比一般的十字弩更难以填充弩矢。

description.original: A sturdy crossbow, though its destructive potential is lackluster.
description.display: 很结实的十字弩，虽然其破坏力稍微欠缺。

description.original: Reinforced with an alloy of my own invention.
description.display: 采用我自研的合金强化过的十字弩。

description.original: The draw strength is several times higher than any gnome could manage unaided.
description.display: 此弩的拉力是一般侏儒的臂力的数倍。

description.original: Well worn and still warm, but not ideal for tracking prey through the forest.
description.display: 常年使用依然暖和的斗篷，但不太适合在林中狩猎时使用。

description.original: A simple cloak made for someone of a shorter stature, like myself.
description.display: 适合犹如我这般矮小的人使用。

description.original: Blends in with the forest, allowing me to pass unseen.
description.display: 让我轻易地融入林中不被发现。

description.original: Even all these years later, my heart still beats faster when I see a dark elf.
description.display: 那么多年以后，每当我见到卓尔精灵时依然会心跳加速。

description.original: It's still got a few bolts left; they'll have to do.
description.display: 只剩下缪缪无几的弩矢；只能凑合着用了。

description.original: It won't tear or rip when I grab a bolt.
description.display: 每次抓取弩矢时它都不会有丝毫磨损。

description.original: As finely crafted a quiver as a ranger could hope for.
description.display: 任何巡林客都梦寐以求的箭囊。

name.original: Bursting Quiver of the Endless Barrage

description.original: The capacity of this quiver never seems to expire.
description.display: 此箭囊就像个无底洞取之不尽用之不竭。

description.original: Scrapped together from a few failed experiments.
description.display: 采用数个实验性废品拼凑而成的眼镜。

description.original: They're heavy, but it's better than being blind!
description.display: 虽然很沉重，但总比看什么都模糊不清来得好！

description.original: Have you read the latest symposium on clockwork animals? Fascinating!
description.display: 你阅读了最新一期针对发条动物的研讨会了吗？太精彩了！

name.original: Bifocal Glasses of the Aged Gnome
name.display: 老年侏儒的双焦点眼镜

description.original: When you're as old as I am, a good set of glasses is a lifesaver.
description.display: 当你也活得跟我一样老时，你就会懂得眼镜的重要性了。

description.original: Go on, skibbers! You can make it!
description.display: 加油，小鼠鼠！你可以做到的！

description.original: That... can't be good.
description.display: 这......这情况有点不妙啊。

description.original: Come on, buddy! You can make it!
description.display: 加油，小兄弟！你可以做到的！

name.display: 炼金术师火焰之机械松鼠

description.original: I call him skibbers! He goes boom!
description.display: 我叫他小鼠鼠！他会自爆！

description.original: It's missing a few important tools, but I can make do.
description.display: 缺乏几件关键的工具，但还是可以凑合着用的。

description.original: This ol' set has gotten me out of more than a couple close scrapes.
description.display: 这套工具曾多次救过我的命。

description.original: Every tool you could ever want. No nozzle, nail, or nut can withstand me.
description.display: 你所需要的工具应有尽有。没有任何喷嘴、钉子、或螺丝可以阻挡得住我。

name.display: 修补匠的横扫千军工具箱

description.original: If skibbers does his job right, I'll need this set to fix him up.
description.display: 要是小鼠鼠成功完成使命的话，那我就要靠这套工具来修好它了。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Gnome Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a WIS score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a CON score of 13 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Good Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Zorbu grew up in a small village on the slopes of the mountains south of Yartar. He lived a typical gnomish childhood: tinkering with mechanical toys, pulling pranks on unsuspecting neighbors, and exploring the woodlands covering the mountains in the company of a local dwarf ranger, Galor Rockshield. One night an army of Lolth's followers descended upon the village in force. Galor saved Zorbu's life, but many others were killed, including Zorbu's parents. From that day forth, Zorbu trained under Galor as a ranger, vowing to prevent another such tragedy from occurring. Cunning and imaginative, Zorbu makes use of his tinkering skills to wield an impossibly large crossbow called Thunderbolt.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Every one of Zorbu's crossbow shots deal damage to a whole line of enemies. He can also buff nearby champions who have a high dexterity score.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 佐布在雅塔南部山坡上的一个小村庄里长大。他拥有典型的侏儒式童年：捣鼓机械玩具，对毫无戒心的邻居大搞恶作剧，并在当地矮人巡林客盖勒·岩盾的陪伴下，探索覆盖山区的林地。一天晚上，罗丝的追随者结成军队，大局侵袭村庄。盖勒救了佐布的命，但包括佐布父母在内的许多人都被杀了。从那天起，佐布在盖勒的手下接受巡林客训练，发誓要避免这样的惨剧再度发生。狡黠而富有想象力的佐布，利用他的巧匠技能制作了一把大得夸张的十字弩，名为“霹雳”
character_sheet_details.system_description: 佐布每次用十字弩射击时，都会对一条线上的敌人造成伤害。他还可以对附近拥有高灵巧点数的勇士进行增益。

original.description: Come on, buddy! You can make it!

display.name: 迅速的机械松鼠
display.description: 加油，小兄弟！你可以做到的！

display.description: 缺乏几件关键的工具，但还是可以凑合着用的。

original.name: Worn Toolset
original.description: This ol' set has gotten me out of more than a couple close scrapes.

display.name: 陈旧的工具箱
display.description: 这套工具曾多次救过我的命。

original.name: Tinker's Toolset of Total Annihilation
original.description: If skibbers does his job right, I'll need this set to fix him up.

display.name: 修补匠的横扫千军工具箱
display.description: 要是小鼠鼠成功完成使命的话，那我就要靠这套工具来修好它了。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%

使所有男性勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
